system_summary.scope_description: Reviewed Itemmanager renewal, settings, and update flows to extract business rules and domain concepts with emphasis on duplicated period, pricing, and tax logic.

business_items.name: Period Unit Mapping (Choices)
business_items.business_description: Period type indices map to duration units (day/week/month/year) with a week correction used to compute date ranges for renewal choices.

sources.code_or_text_excerpt: period_type index maps to D/W/M/Y and week uses +7 correction for end date calculation

business_items.name: Period Unit Mapping (Membership Extension)
business_items.business_description: Membership extension uses period type indices to determine interval units and applies week correction when computing membership end dates.

sources.code_or_text_excerpt: periodsIdx maps to D/W/M/Y and week adds 7-day correction; end date is start + duration - 1 day

business_items.name: Period Count Override (Update Preview)
business_items.business_description: Effective period count is derived from Itemmanager periods, overridden by per-item exception periods, and forced to 1 when reverse or invalid.

sources.code_or_text_excerpt: periods = period_item->periods; if enable_period_exception use exception_periods; if invalid or reverse then 1

business_items.name: Period Count Override (Update Apply)
business_items.business_description: Update execution repeats the same override rules for effective period count and reverse handling.

sources.code_or_text_excerpt: periods = period_item->periods; if enable_period_exception use exception_periods; if invalid or reverse then 1

business_items.name: Period Count Override (Renewal Line Prototype)
business_items.business_description: Renewal line item prototypes compute effective periods with exception overrides and force single period when reverse or invalid.

sources.code_or_text_excerpt: periods = period_item->periods; if enable_period_exception use exception_periods; if invalid or reverse then 1

business_items.name: Unit Price per Period (Choices)
business_items.business_description: Choice display price is the item amount divided by periods unless reverse mode uses the full amount.

sources.code_or_text_excerpt: summary_price = reverse ? amount : amount/periods
sources.differences_vs_group_canonical: Explicit reverse branch instead of forcing periods to 1.

business_items.name: Unit Price per Period (Update Items)
business_items.business_description: Line item unit price is recalculated as price field value amount divided by effective periods during update preview and apply.

sources.code_or_text_excerpt: change_unit_price = field_amount / periods
sources.differences_vs_group_canonical: Reverse handled indirectly via periods forced to 1 rather than explicit branch.

business_items.name: Unit Price per Period (Renewal Line Prototype)
business_items.business_description: Renewal line item unit price is calculated as price field value amount divided by effective periods.

sources.code_or_text_excerpt: unit_price = amount / periods
sources.differences_vs_group_canonical: Reverse handled by forcing periods to 1 before dividing.

business_items.name: Tax Amount Calculation (Update Items)
business_items.business_description: Tax for updated line items is computed as quantity × unit price × tax rate percentage.

sources.code_or_text_excerpt: changed_tax = qty * unit_price * tax/100

business_items.name: Tax Amount Calculation (Renewal Line Prototype)
business_items.business_description: Tax for renewal line items is computed as quantity × unit price × tax rate percentage.

sources.code_or_text_excerpt: new_tax = qty * unit_price * tax/100
sources.differences_vs_group_canonical: Uses tax rate from CRM_Itemmanager_Util; no explicit rounding.

business_items.name: Tax Amount Calculation (Renewal Line Items)
business_items.business_description: Tax amount for line items is calculated using CiviCRM's tax utility and rounded to currency precision.

sources.code_or_text_excerpt: tax_amount calculated via CRM_Contribute_BAO_Contribution_Utils and MoneyUtilities::roundToCurrencyPrecision
sources.differences_vs_group_canonical: Uses rounding utility and tax utility instead of raw multiplication.

business_items.name: Ignore Item in Successor Set
business_items.business_description: Items flagged as ignored are excluded from successor item selection when generating missing item choices.

sources.code_or_text_excerpt: ItemmanagerSettings query filters ignore = FALSE and novitiate = FALSE

business_items.name: Ignore Item in Renewal UI
business_items.business_description: Items flagged as ignored are skipped in renewal UI line item generation.

sources.code_or_text_excerpt: if itemmanager setting ignore then continue
sources.differences_vs_group_canonical: Does not consider novitiate flag when skipping.

business_items.name: Price Set Consistency per Membership
business_items.business_description: All selected price field values within the same membership must come from the same price set.

sources.code_or_text_excerpt: compares hidden price set ids per membership; rejects mixed sets

business_items.name: Period Count Consistency per Membership
business_items.business_description: All selected items within the same membership must use the same period count.

sources.code_or_text_excerpt: rejects differing period selections within a membership

business_items.name: Successor Item Selection Constraints
business_items.business_description: Successor price field values are limited to price sets matching financial type and membership type, and optionally restricted to the configured successor price set.

sources.code_or_text_excerpt: filters price sets by financial_type_id and price field values by financial_type_id and membership_type_id; respects successor period price set

business_items.name: Successor Period Selection
business_items.business_description: Successor periods can only be chosen from other price sets that have Itemmanager periods configured.

sources.code_or_text_excerpt: builds selection of ItemmanagerPeriods from other price sets

business_items.name: Itemmanager Period Entity
business_items.business_description: Represents a price set's period configuration, including start date, duration, period type, successor period, hide, and reverse flags.

sources.code_or_text_excerpt: period_start_on, periods, period_type, successor, hide, reverse

business_items.name: Itemmanager Setting Entity
business_items.business_description: Represents per-price-field settings such as successor item, ignore, extend, novitiate, bidding, and exception period rules.

sources.code_or_text_excerpt: ignore, extend, novitiate, bidding, enable_period_exception, exception_periods, successor

business_items.name: Renewal Plan Selection by Period Count
business_items.business_description: Renewal uses a single-installment plan when periods equal 1; otherwise it uses a multiple-installment plan.

sources.code_or_text_excerpt: if periods == 1 use RenewalSingleInstallmentPlan else RenewalMultipleInstallmentPlan

concept_groups.business_intent_summary: Ensure consistent conversion of period types into date interval units and corrections for week-based periods.
concept_groups.risk_explanation: Logic is duplicated but matches between choice rendering and membership extension; divergence would affect period dates.
concept_groups.harmonization_strategy: Centralize period unit mapping in a shared helper method used by both choice rendering and membership extension.

concept_groups.business_intent_summary: Determine effective period count by applying exception periods and forcing single-period behavior for reverse or invalid configurations.
concept_groups.risk_explanation: Repeated logic across preview, update, and renewal increases risk of drift that could misalign pricing and contribution dates.
concept_groups.harmonization_strategy: Extract a shared "effectivePeriods" utility in CRM_Itemmanager_Util and reuse in update and renewal flows.

concept_groups.business_intent_summary: Compute per-period unit price from item amount and effective periods, respecting reverse configurations.

inconsistencies.description: Reverse handling is explicit in choice rendering but implicit via periods forced to 1 in update/renewal flows.

concept_groups.risk_explanation: Different reverse handling could produce mismatched display prices vs actual renewal charges if period override logic changes.
concept_groups.harmonization_strategy: Create a canonical unit price calculation helper that takes amount, periods, and reverse flag and apply consistently.

concept_groups.business_intent_summary: Calculate tax for line items based on financial type tax rate and line totals.

inconsistencies.description: Some paths use raw multiplication without rounding while another uses CiviCRM tax utilities with currency rounding.

concept_groups.risk_explanation: Rounding inconsistencies can cause mismatched totals between updated contributions and renewed installments.
concept_groups.harmonization_strategy: Standardize tax calculation by routing all tax computations through the same utility (e.g., CRM_Contribute_BAO_Contribution_Utils + MoneyUtilities).

concept_groups.business_intent_summary: Exclude ignored items from successor selection and renewal UI.

inconsistencies.description: Successor selection excludes novitiate items in addition to ignore, while renewal UI only checks ignore.

concept_groups.risk_explanation: Different filters may cause novitiate items to appear in renewal UI even if excluded from successor sets.
concept_groups.harmonization_strategy: Define a shared eligibility predicate for inclusion in renewal UI and successor lists (ignore/novitiate/etc.).

concept_groups.business_intent_summary: All items within a membership renewal selection must come from the same price set.
concept_groups.risk_explanation: Single enforcement point; risk is low but absence of parallel checks in other layers could allow bypass.
concept_groups.harmonization_strategy: Consider server-side validation in renewal execution or shared validator to prevent bypass outside the form.

concept_groups.business_intent_summary: All items within the same membership renewal must use the same period count.
concept_groups.risk_explanation: Single enforcement point; inconsistencies could arise if API usage bypasses form validation.
concept_groups.harmonization_strategy: Add validation in renewal processing layer to enforce period consistency beyond the UI.

concept_groups.business_intent_summary: Only items from compatible price sets, financial types, and membership types are eligible as successors.
concept_groups.risk_explanation: Single location rule; limited risk unless other pathways add successors without the constraints.
concept_groups.harmonization_strategy: Document the constraints and enforce in any programmatic successor assignment as a shared validation.

concept_groups.business_intent_summary: Successor periods are chosen from other price sets that have configured Itemmanager periods.
concept_groups.risk_explanation: Single location rule; low risk unless other flows allow invalid successor links.
concept_groups.harmonization_strategy: Validate successor period assignments in persistence layer or BAO updates.

concept_groups.business_intent_summary: Model for period configuration per price set used throughout renewal and update flows.
concept_groups.risk_explanation: Concept is consistently represented but changes must propagate to multiple flows using its fields.
concept_groups.harmonization_strategy: Document entity fields and ensure access via a single BAO/DAO helper to avoid drift.

concept_groups.business_intent_summary: Per-price-field configuration controlling successor, ignore/extend flags, and exception period behavior.
concept_groups.risk_explanation: Single definition but used across multiple flows; inconsistent usage could emerge.
concept_groups.harmonization_strategy: Centralize access to setting flags with helper methods for common predicates.

concept_groups.business_intent_summary: Determine whether to renew via single-installment or multi-installment plan based on period count.
concept_groups.risk_explanation: Single decision point; inconsistent logic elsewhere could cause mismatched renewal plan behavior.
concept_groups.harmonization_strategy: Move the decision into the renewal logic layer or service so the UI is not the sole enforcement.

missing_or_ambiguous_rules.description: No centralized definition for "effective periods" and reverse handling; logic is duplicated across renewal and update workflows.
Tax rounding behavior is not uniformly specified; some paths round and others do not.

technical_debt_notes.description: Period type mapping (D/W/M/Y plus week correction) is hard-coded in multiple places, increasing maintenance overhead.
Duplicate pricing and tax formulas in update preview and update apply steps create a risk of drift when changes are introduced.
